name: bank-receipts-phase-a
description: Phase A: schema + lock + CsvSource + dry-run for bank-receipts ingestion (per LLD.md). Standalone reference impl — port src/ into BEE app, run migration via prisma migrate dev
comment_scripts: Run via tsx (not bare node --experimental-strip-types): Node's type-stripping does NOT rewrite '.js' import specifiers to '.ts' sources, so bare node throws ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND. tsx resolves them. For production, `npm run build` then run dist/*.js.
